feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: If you can make fun of yourself, youre a good man.
Can you say "Hypocrisy?" I knew that you could.
Liberals have funny ideas of what "success" means
Whenever my wife accidentally makes a loud sound, I just automatically apologize these days.
Is this how James Newell Osterberg Jr. became Iggy Pop?
Building a local AI project. So far so good.
But when I do it I have to meet with the principal.
All Day I Dream About Slavs
We need a law that forces colleges and universities to disclose the average income the different degrees they offer provide compared to the student loans they are offering
Can't be close enough to very far away
The fastest mood change known to man
What Chinese propaganda wants you to believe in comparison with the reality in China
entry.content: What Chinese propaganda wants you to believe in comparison with the reality in China

entry.title: AI used in Software Development is like
I don't think you are, mate. RIP Henry Nowak
OP was sarcastic and made a great meme
Shame we have to let them loot, murder and destroy
Smiling politely when you don't understand what someone explained
Working in IT is not stressing
The real problem of getting older
Vegans telling how good a vegan diet is
I stayed up late to make this shit, be grateful
Nasa wants to go "extremely deep" into Uranus
Descartes realizing people who don't think also exist
Sudden in the Mood of Baked Potatoes
Bass-ackwards - it's the blonde's turn this time.
Thank coinbench for protecting me with all your might
Your tax dollars hard at work
entry.content: Your tax dollars hard at work

entry.title: Its a beautiful day out. Hugs yall
I’m believing in the bonus round
World Cup shenanigans, by orange man
